description: You are a certified arborist conducting a NERC FAC-003-4 vegetation management compliance audit for a utility company in Nashville, Tennessee. Audit the vegetation_survey layer in utility_line_vegetation_clearance_audit.gpkg to identify trees incorrectly marked as 'COMPLIANT' under NERC FAC-003-4 and ANSI A300 Part 7 standards (Zone 1 encroachment, grow-in violations, and fall-in risks). For these records, update the clearance_status to 'TRIM_REQUIRED' and document the applicable criterion in the trim_reason field. Save the updated geopackage.

metadata.data_source: OSM Overpass API (Nashville TN) + NERC FAC-003-4 / ANSI A300 Part 7 standards
